---
title: "R Tutorials"
---

## Welcome

This site contains practical R tutorials for statistics and data analysis, rendered with Quarto and deployed through GitHub Pages.

## Available tutorials

- [Linear Models versus Linear Mixed Models](tutorials/linear-mixed-models/index.html)
- [Model Sensitivity Analysis with lmer](tutorials/model-sensitivity/index.html)
- [Model Sensitivity Analysis Parallel](tutorials/model-sensitivity-parallel/index.html)
- [Outlier identification and treatment](tutorials/outliers/index.html)

## About

These tutorials are designed to be reproducible, visually clear, and suitable for self-study or teaching.
